Package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

Interface BeanFilter

All Known Implementing Classes:
MarshalledFilter
public interface BeanFilter
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the per-class filter surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalent) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side MarshalledFilter.

Marshalling-side MarshalledFilter implements this interface; bean-modeling-side code only sees BeanFilter. This interface is restricted to commons-compatible return types (collections, ClassInfo, PropertyNamer, plain values).

Thread safety
Thread safety depends on implementation.

  • Method Details

    • getBeanClass

      ClassInfoTyped<?> getBeanClass()
      Returns:
      The bean class that this filter applies to, or null if this is a non-bean filter.

    • getTypeName

      String getTypeName()
      Returns:
      The dictionary name associated with this bean, or null if no name is defined.

    • getExample

      String getExample()
      Returns:
      The example associated with this class, or null.

    • getImplClass

      ClassInfo getImplClass()
      Returns:
      The implementation class associated with this class, or null.

    • getInterfaceClass

      ClassInfo getInterfaceClass()
      Returns:
      The interface class associated with this class, or null.

    • getStopClass

      ClassInfo getStopClass()
      Returns:
      The stop class associated with this class, or null.

    • getProperties

      Set<String> getProperties()
      Returns:
      The names of the properties associated with the bean class (ordered), or an empty set if all properties.

    • getExcludeProperties

      Set<String> getExcludeProperties()
      Returns:
      The names of the properties to ignore on a bean, or an empty set.

    • getReadOnlyProperties

      Set<String> getReadOnlyProperties()
      Returns:
      The names of the read-only properties on a bean, or an empty set.

    • getWriteOnlyProperties

      Set<String> getWriteOnlyProperties()
      Returns:
      The names of the write-only properties on a bean, or an empty set.

    • getPropertyNamer

      PropertyNamer getPropertyNamer()
      Returns:
      The property namer for this filter, or null.

    • getBeanDictionary

      List<ClassInfo> getBeanDictionary()
      Returns:
      The list of bean dictionary classes, or an empty list.

    • isFluentSetters

      boolean isFluentSetters()
      Returns:
      true if fluent setters should be found.

    • isUnsortedProperties

      boolean isUnsortedProperties()
      Returns:
      true if this bean opts out of alphabetical property sorting.

    • readProperty

      Object readProperty(Object bean, String name, Object value)
      Calls the BeanInterceptor.readProperty(Object, String, Object) on the registered interceptor.
      Parameters:
      bean - The bean from which the property was read.
      name - The property name.
      value - The value just extracted from calling the bean getter.
      Returns:
      The value to serialize. Default is just to return the existing value.

    • writeProperty

      Object writeProperty(Object bean, String name, Object value)
      Calls the BeanInterceptor.writeProperty(Object, String, Object) on the registered interceptor.
      Parameters:
      bean - The bean to which the property is being written.
      name - The property name.
      value - The value just parsed.
      Returns:
      The value to assign. Default is just to return the existing value.
